title: scope-discovery LLM judge + auditor configuration
description: Configuration for the multi-source LLM ensemble (the LLM judge + external auditor). Defines the internal LLM-judge (in-band, every turn) + external LLM auditor (out-of-band, fired by orchestrator every turn, results materialize in audit log for next turn). Both sections are required; orchestrator_runtime_dir is optional with documented default. The model + agent_type values are tokens the orchestrator's DispatchFn interprets (per the LLM judge + external auditor pre-made decision: actual LLM API integration is OUT OF SCOPE for the library; the library defines the SHAPE of the call, the orchestrator-agent performs the dispatch).

model.description: Model identifier the orchestrator dispatches the judge through. Free-form; the orchestrator's DispatchFn maps the value to a real model endpoint.

agent_type.description: Agent-type token passed to wrap()'s DispatchFn. The orchestrator routes this to the configured judge model + system prompt scaffold.

confidence_floor.description: Minimum proposal confidence for auto-disposition. Proposals BELOW this floor are still surfaced; the the self-correcting controller controller treats them as escalation candidates.

model.description: Model identifier the external auditor process runs. MUST be a different model class from judge.model — the auditor cannot self-grade the judge's work (the LLM judge + external auditor independence rule).

pending_audits_dir.description: Repo-relative directory where audit-request artifacts land. The external auditor process polls this directory; results materialize back as AUDIT-<date>-<NN> entries in the feature's audit-log.

orchestrator_runtime_dir.description: Repo-relative directory for orchestrator runtime scratch (audit-log watermark, in-flight turn state). Default `.dw-lifecycle/scope-discovery/orchestrator-runtime`. Gitignored.
